Objection-Handling-Document-2:
This context is related to objection handling:
Objection Handling
1) Customer: I don’t believe in the concept of Life Insurance.
Acknowledge: Sir, I can understand that you do not believe in Life Insurance.
Clarify: However, I am sure you believe in ensuring the safety & security of your loved ones at all times, Isn’t it Sir??
Resolve: If the answer is Yes. Sir, in that case Life Insurance is the best tool to ensure complete financial protection for your loved ones. Right from day one it safeguards your family against uncertainties of life at a very affordable cost. Let me explain you in detail.
2)
Customer: I don’t need Life Insurance.
Acknowledge: Sir, I can understand you do not need Life Insurance.
Clarify: However, let me take your few minutes to make your understand why life insurance is must for every responsible breadwinner of the family
Resolve: Sir, there is a popular study by Limra that says 84% of people will outlive the normal life expectancy & 16% of the people will have a premature death. While we know these numbers, unfortunately we don’t know who will fall in which bucket, and therefore one must prepare for both

This context is related to objection handling:
 While we know these numbers, unfortunately we don’t know who will fall in which bucket, and therefore one must prepare for both the situations. Life Insurance is the best tool to protect and achieve the dreams and aspirations of your loved ones irrespective of life situations.
3)
Customer: I will buy Life Insurance Later
Acknowledge: Sir, I can understand that you want to postpone buying life insurance today.
Clarify: However, had it been any other decision, I would haven’t requested you to give it a second thought, but with life insurance I certainly will.
Resolve: Sir, If you see the spelling of “LIFE” itself has a word “IF” in it. Life itself is full of “Ifs” And I am sure you would agree with me that uncertainties can arise any time! In such cases, a life insurance policy will take care of financial liabilities & responsibilities of your loved ones in your absence. Who/What else can guarantee this? As a responsible head of family, would you still like to take this risk of postponing the decision? 4)
Customer: I have other priorities right now than buying life insurance
Acknowledge: Sir, I can understand

This context is related to objection handling:
 4)
Customer: I have other priorities right now than buying life insurance
Acknowledge: Sir, I can understand that you want to take care of other responsibilities first rather than buying a life insurance
Clarify: Let me ask you a question Sir, If you have a goose who lays golden eggs, who would you insure first – the goose or the golden eggs, and why?
Resolve: Precisely Sir, because of the goose is there, the golden eggs will keep coming. That’s exactly the way the financial planning be approached. First have life insurance in place to guard against uncertainties of life which may strike any time. Thereafter, as you grow in life keep adding other investments for wealth creation & other financial needs. But first it’s always about strengthening the base of the pyramid i.e. ensuring adequate protection for family.
5)
Customer: I don’t need life insurance now.
Acknowledge: Sir, I can understand you don’t need life insurance now.
Clarify: But Sir, you must buy life insurance when you don’t need it!
Resolve: Because of buying life insurance, one doesn’t just need money, but also good health.

This context is related to objection handling:

Clarify: But Sir, you must buy life insurance when you don’t need it!
Resolve: Because of buying life insurance, one doesn’t just need money, but also good health. Also with increasing age, life insurance premiums also are higher. Therefore, considering the uncertainties of life and life insurance becoming costlier with increasing age, one must buy adequate life insurance at the first available opportunity.
6)
Customer: Buying life insurance is costly, time consuming & cumbersome.
Acknowledge: Sir, I can understand that you feel buying life insurance is costly and tiresome experience.
Clarify: Let me help you break this popular myth about life insurance.
Resolve: Life insurance is the only tool which can help you solve $100 problem with $1. Just pay 29000 today and you can create a financial security in the event of death of life insured of up to Rs 1 Crore for your loved ones for as high as 50 years. (Male age 35, PT 50 Years, PPT 20 Years, SA 1 Cr, Option I in ABSLI Digishield Plan )
Knowing this I am pretty sure you will agree that protecting the financial goals of your loved ones through life insurance is very affordable.

This context is related to objection handling:
 (Male age 35, PT 50 Years, PPT 20 Years, SA 1 Cr, Option I in ABSLI Digishield Plan )
Knowing this I am pretty sure you will agree that protecting the financial goals of your loved ones through life insurance is very affordable. Not only that, it also gives you complete peace of mind. As with the payment of 1st premium (and the issuance of the policy) your end goal gets protected immediately. Also, you can buy life insurance without stepping out of house with just a few clicks. Also, we have tele medical limits. You also have to answer few health related questions over the phone/video call and your policy will be issued. (Terms and conditions apply)
7)
Customer: I already have life insurance which will give a lump sum amount to my family in case of my death.
Acknowledge: Sir, let me first appreciate you that you have created a financial safety net for your loved ones against uncertainties.
Clarify: However, you must check whether the cover that you have taken is sufficient or not and is there an additional solution required.
Resolve: Sir, experts say that the minimum amount of cover that you must have is 200 times of your monthly household expenses.

This context is related to objection handling:

Resolve: Sir, experts say that the minimum amount of cover that you must have is 200 times of your monthly household expenses. Therefore if there is any deficit basis this calculation, it needs to be fulfilled. Secondly, there is a study that says whenever families get life insurance claim in lump sum due to death of the bread winner. The amount doesn’t last for more than 18-36 months as the family members are not able to manage it properly. I can suggest you a complementary solution to your existing cover where in case of your demise, the family gets a regular monthly income level/@5% increasing p.a. simple for 20 years. So the lump sum can be utilized to pay off the immediate liabilities if any and the regular income will take care of the life style & day to day living expenses, ensuring complete financial security for your loved ones in your absence.
8)
Customer: If nothing happens life insurance premiums are lost
£
Acknowledge: Sir, I understand you feel life insurance premiums are wasted if the life insured survives till maturity.

This context is related to objection handling:

8)
Customer: If nothing happens life insurance premiums are lost
£
Acknowledge: Sir, I understand you feel life insurance premiums are wasted if the life insured survives till maturity.
Clarify: In fact, we would want you to live a long and healthy life.
Resolve: However, just because one has a fire extinguisher at home, would he like his house to catch fire so that he can use the fire extinguisher? Similarly, we don’t want any death/disability/disease to occur but if it does happen, there should be a financial safety net available for the family.
Also, I have two options in my solution which can help you address your concern- one there is return of premium option available where if the life assured survives, till the end of policy term all premiums paid are returned at the end of policy term. Second, there is a whole life option where the risk cover is till age 100 years, which means security for longer duration. 9)
Customer: Term plan only comes into action, when I die, there are no living benefits.
Acknowledge: Sir, I can understand you concern of a term plans not providing living benefits.

This context is related to objection handling:
 9)
Customer: Term plan only comes into action, when I die, there are no living benefits.
Acknowledge: Sir, I can understand you concern of a term plans not providing living benefits.
Clarify: However, Sir this is just a myth and there are certain unique options available in my term solution which can provide protection along with some other benefits to you as well.
Resolve: One, there is a level cover plus income benefit option (Option 9) where if the life insured survives till age 60, then he starts getting a monthly guaranteed & tax free income till the end of policy term therefore providing the best of both the worlds – protection + income. Second, there is return of premium option available where if the life assured survives till the end of policy term , all the premiums are returned at the end of the policy term.
10)
Customer: Your term plan is costly as compared to term plans from other companies.
Acknowledge: Sir, I can understand your feel that ABSLI’s Digishield & Life Shield Plan is costly.
Clarify: Sir, let me share with you some details to establish the fact that ABSLI solution is not only economical but a value for money proposition.

This context is related to objection handling:

Clarify: Sir, let me share with you some details to establish the fact that ABSLI solution is not only economical but a value for money proposition.
Resolve: One, there are 9 options to choose from to fit your exact requirement with some being unique ones like increasing cover option (Option 2) , Whole Life reducing option (Option 5), Income Benefit option (Option 6) and level cover plus income benefit option (Option 9). Second, there are some amazing add on benefits like joint life cover , ACI Cover, Enhanced Life Stage Protection and rider along with inbuilt terminal illness benefit. Third, the flexible PPT & PT combinations to choose from. Fourth, we have very relaxed guidelines considering educational qualification, unearned income for meeting income threshold limits and accept surrogates for increasing the cover amount that you can get , give cover to agriculturists, housewives and NRIs, tele-video FMR limits etc. And last but not the least our premiums are very economical and give you the flexibility to choose from various PPT options.

This context is related to objection handling:
 And last but not the least our premiums are very economical and give you the flexibility to choose from various PPT options.
